summary: Iteration 5 - Retest after SEC-003 fix on GET /api/students (list_students projection now excludes both face_descriptor and face_image at server.py:142). Ran targeted case test_security_audit2::TestSEC003NoBiometricLeak::test_list_students_no_biometric and then the full backend test suite. All 16 SEC audit tests PASS. Full suite: 75 passed / 0 failed / 0 skipped in 15.78s (previous iter4 was 74/1F/1S). The prior skip on TestZCleanup::test_delete_created_student (xdist worker isolation artifact) also did not recur this run. No TEST_* leftovers in Mongo after run; 3 seeded students intact. SEC-003 leak fully closed on the admin list endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: SEC-003 leak on GET /api/students is CLOSED - projection at server.py:142 now correctly strips both face_descriptor and face_image. Verified by test_list_students_no_biometric on freshly enrolled student.

MINOR (carry-over, non-blocking): db.students still stores face_image (base64) inline on the profile row - consider moving to a dedicated face_vectors collection to reduce list-scan bloat and centralize PII lifecycle.
MINOR (carry-over): create_student inserts users+students without transactional rollback; enroll_face accepts any descriptor length >=64 without locking to 128-D.
test_credentials: Admin admin@college.edu / admin123; students aarav/diya/rohan@college.edu / student123 - verified via SEC-001 continuity tests.
seed_data_creation: Tests create/delete throwaway TEST_SA2_*, TEST_IMP_*, TEST_MSOK_*, TEST_S3C_*, TEST_S3U_* students per case. Post-run Mongo scan confirmed 0 lingering TEST_* documents; the 3 seeded students remain intact.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend security posture is 100% green after iter5. SEC-001/002/003 all covered by test_security_audit2.py (16 cases) plus regression coverage in test_security.py, test_mark_self.py, backend_test.py. If new features are added that return student objects, ensure the same _assert_no_biometric helper (or equivalent projection {"_id":0,"face_descriptor":0,"face_image":0}) is applied.
rca of the issue: Fix verified: /app/backend/server.py line 142 projection updated from {"_id":0,"face_descriptor":0} to {"_id":0,"face_descriptor":0,"face_image":0}. Re-running the previously failing test on a freshly enrolled student now returns face_enrolled=true with no face_image key in any list row. No regressions detected across the 75-test suite.
